title: lateristachys halconensis
intro: Lateristachys halconensis, also known as the Philippine angel's trumpet or Halcon's angel's trumpet, is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been isolated from the plant's leaves and stems. The health benefits of Lateristachys halconensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
